benefits.description: Building collagen and locking in moisture; recommends GHK-CU alongside skincare routine and red light therapy for lip/skin improvement

protocol_notes: Recommends GHK-CU with a good skincare routine including red light therapy. Also mentions Asian Beauty products as cost-effective and hydrating. Personal go-to overnight lip mask is A&D ointment, having experimented with various lip masks and balms.
